violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
The hand-washing sink in the front counter was lacking paper towels. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (mixers and other equipment) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

The presence of (rodents) is not controlled as evidenced by (droppings throughout storage and kitchen areas ). The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Per PIC, PCS services 1x monthly. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

The door to the outside, located in the (back storage ), is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025
(Various food product ) were observed stored on the floor in the (walk in cooler and kitchen area ). Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the: 1.food storage shelves 2.bakers racks 3.bread racks 4.can opener and can opener base 5.prep table shelves have an accumulation of food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

The floors and walls throughout the back kitchen and storage areas and floors in walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment, items, and/or clutter were observed in the (back storage) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 03/11/2025

Various biscuits and pastries packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

The following equipment observed not in good repair: 1.walk in cooler door handle loose 2.door handle to 2 dr refrigerator observed wrapped with duct tape. 3.pastry display unit observed with inadequate ambient temperatures(49DF). Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the slicer and bakers racks have an accumulation of food residue. Establishment to wash and sanitize equipment prior to use. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/11/2024

The floors under equipment in the walk in cooler have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

Various food product was observed held at (45-45) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC voluntarily disposed of food. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

Various biscuits packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
Inspector observed towels being used to cover food.PIC informed to cease practice New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

Bowls are being used as scoops in containers of dry ingredients. Utensils used to dispense non-time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods such as sugar and flour must be stored in the food item with their handles above the top of the food within the container. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

The following equipment observed not in good repair: 1.walk in cooler door handle loose 2.door handle to 2 dr refrigerator observed wrapped with duct tape. 3.pastry display unit and 2 dr refrigerator observed with inadequate ambient temperatures. New Violation. Correct By: 04/26/2024
The non-food contact surfaces of the bread dough racks and 2 dr refrigerator have an accumulation of food residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024

The floors throughout the facility(including walk in cooler) have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/26/2024
The ceiling vents in kitchen area has an accumulation of dust and/or debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/29/2024
